description: PLMKR A&R Scout knowledge base — load order for system prompt assembly

files.description: Five-Pillar scoring rubric, verdict ladder, hard gates, risk assessment framework
Three-Axis evaluation model, commercial ceiling tiers, audio grounding principles, structural evaluation frameworks
Development arc model, identity development, trajectory assessment, investment case framework, waterfall release model, career stage classification, coach mode
Territory-specific A&R knowledge: K-pop, LatAm, Afrobeats, UK, Japan, India, SEA, Germany, France, MENA, Canada — crossover sequencing strategy
Four output templates: Signing Evaluation Memo, Watch-List Entry, Development Review, Coach-Mode Feedback

Deal structures and signing mechanics: deal type taxonomy, advance mechanics, recoupment structure, rights flags, option periods, offer-to-close workflow, competitive bidding discipline, catalog acquisition vs. new signing

notes.entity_wall: These files are PLMKR-owned originals. Do not reference external sources, rubric identifiers, or entity names from source material.
notes.mock_mode: All assessment routes default to AR_SCOUT_MOCK_MODE=true — no live Anthropic calls during testing.
